name: STL Validator (Binary + ASCII)
description: Validates both binary and ASCII STL files for manufacturing suitability: detects format automatically, checks manifold closure (open/non-manifold edges), inverted face normals via winding-order cross-product, and degenerate (zero-area) triangles. Accepts a single STL file path as CLI argument and prints JSON {valid, format, triangle_count, surface_area, issues}.
